import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function OrderHistory(_ref){let{user}=_ref;const[orders,setOrders]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{if(user){fetchOrders();}},[user]);const fetchOrders=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get(`http://localhost:5000/orders/user/${user._id}`);setOrders(response.data.reverse());// Show newest first
}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching orders:",error);}};const cancelOrder=async orderId=>{if(!window.confirm("ARE YOU SURE YOU WANT TO CANCEL THIS ORDER?"))return;try{await axios.delete(`http://localhost:5000/orders/${orderId}`);fetchOrders();}catch(error){console.error("Error cancelling order:",error);}};if(!user)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"PLEASE LOG IN TO SEE YOUR ORDERS"});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"ORDER HISTORY"}),orders.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"NO ORDERS FOUND"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:orders.map(order=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"order-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',marginBottom:'1rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{fontWeight:900,fontSize:'1.2rem'},children:["ORDER #",order._id.slice(-6)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{opacity:0.6,fontSize:'0.8rem'},children:new Date(order.order_date).toLocaleString()})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"status-badge",children:order.status})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{marginBottom:'1rem'},children:order.items.map((item,idx)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{fontSize:'0.9rem',marginBottom:'0.3rem'},children:[item.name," x ",item.quantity," - $",(item.price*item.quantity).toFixed(2)]},idx))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',alignItems:'center',borderTop:'1px solid #eee',paddingTop:'1rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{fontWeight:900},children:["TOTAL: $",order.total_price.toFixed(2)]}),order.status==='pending'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"button button-outline",style:{padding:'0.5rem 1rem'},onClick:()=>cancelOrder(order._id),children:"CANCEL ORDER"})]})]},order._id))})]});}export default OrderHistory;
